title: rhodocalyx suaveolens
intro: Rhodocalyx suaveolens, also known as the pink rose of Sharon, is a flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Rhodocalyx suaveolens is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
